title: terminalia litoralis var. litoralis
intro: Terminalia litoralis var. litoralis, also known as Coastal Terminalia, is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the coastal areas of Australia and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, skin infections, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have immunomodulatory and antiviral effects. In herbal preparations, Terminalia litoralis var. litoralis is often used in tea or tincture form, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
